codeReview.summary: The implementation fully covers all 18 validation contract assertions (VAL-TEST-080 through VAL-TEST-097) with 54 comprehensive test cases. Tests are well-organized by validator function, follow existing codebase patterns, and verify exact error messages match the implementation. All tests pass successfully.

issues.description: Duplicate test cases for boundary values: validateQuantity(1) is tested at lines 116 and 194-195, validateQuantity(100) at lines 124 and 198-199, validateQuantity(0) at lines 136 and 202-203, validateQuantity(101) at lines 142 and 206-207. These duplicates don't affect correctness but could be consolidated for maintainability.

summary: PASS: Comprehensive Jest tests for src/utils/validators.ts with 54 test cases covering all 18 validation contract assertions. Tests verify validateEmail (valid formats, empty, invalid formats, trimming), validateName (valid, empty, too short, trimming), validateTitle (valid, empty, too short, trimming), and validateQuantity (valid range, non-finite values, boundary values, non-integers). All tests pass. Minor non-blocking issue: some duplicate boundary value tests could be consolidated.
